title: pyrrocoma uniflora
intro: Pyrrocoma uniflora, also known as the Rocky Mountain woolly heads, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even helping to lower cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Pyrrocoma uniflora is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
